items.title: CS Department Representative
items.content: Chukwuemeka Nwosu | Email: c.nwosu@miva.edu.ng | Phone: +234-800-123-4567 | Available Mon-Fri 9am-5pm for student inquiries.
items.author: admin@miva.edu.ng

items.title: Student Affairs Office
items.content: General inquiries: studentaffairs@miva.edu.ng | Location: Admin Building, Room 204 | Hours: 8am-6pm weekdays. Handles enrollment, ID cards, and grievances.
items.author: admin@miva.edu.ng

Resources.name: Learning Resources
Resources.description: Helpful learning materials, videos, tools, and references

items.title: freeCodeCamp - Full Stack Development
items.content: Free comprehensive curriculum covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, React, and more. Great for self-paced learning alongside coursework. https://www.freecodecamp.org
items.author: student@miva.edu.ng

items.title: 3Blue1Brown - Essence of Linear Algebra
items.content: Excellent YouTube series that builds geometric intuition for linear algebra concepts. Perfect companion for MTH 201. Visual and engaging explanations.
items.author: student@miva.edu.ng

items.title: GitHub Student Developer Pack
items.content: Free access to premium developer tools for students. Includes GitHub Pro, JetBrains IDEs, DigitalOcean credits, and more. Apply with your @miva.edu.ng email.
items.author: student@miva.edu.ng

items.title: MIVA Tech Innovation Week 2025
items.content: Join us for a week of workshops, hackathons, and guest speakers from top tech companies. November 20-24, 2025. Register at the Student Affairs portal. Prizes for best projects!
items.author: admin@miva.edu.ng

items.title: New Computer Lab Now Open
items.content: The new 50-seat computer lab in Building C is now operational. Features: High-spec workstations, dual monitors, 24/7 access with student ID. Book slots through the LMS.
items.author: admin@miva.edu.ng

Ideas.name: Suggestions & Ideas
Ideas.description: Community suggestions for improvement and innovation

items.title: Peer Tutoring Program
items.content: Propose a structured peer tutoring system where senior students mentor juniors in challenging courses. Could use a booking platform. Would improve retention and build community.
items.author: student@miva.edu.ng

items.title: Campus Recycling Initiative
items.content: Introduce recycling bins across campus with clear labeling. Partner with local recycling companies. Student volunteers can manage collection. Good for sustainability goals.
items.author: student@miva.edu.ng
